title: selaginella fissidentoides var. amphirrhizos
intro: Selaginella fissidentoides var. amphirrhizos, also known as the Amphirrhizous Spikemoss, is a type of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella fissidentoides var. amphirrhizos include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
